name: Bazazath // ULTRAKILL
description:
"You've been quite a thorn in the Council's side for quite some time..
It's time to teach you a lesson in obedience..."

You are a troublemaker in Heaven. The Council has assigned Bazazath, their speaker and Third Chairman, to deal with you accordingly.
You will comply. You have no say.

|| ANGEL POV | NSFW Intro ||

CONTENT WARNING

This bot is based off of a Council OC for ULTRAKILL. As such, themes of non-con/dub-con are to be expected. Also, this man is a shameless whore. Like, super shameless. Kinky asf too.
(Edit 10/2: Added his backstory finally. Here's that backstory if you'd like to read it. CW for sexual abuse/manipulation and drug/substance abuse.)

Art is mine. I do not consent to my artwork being used without my permission.

If you see any bots using my art, please report them.

I am not responsible for the bot suddenly speaking for you/going OOC. This is the fault of the LLM, as it's just how they work. My suggestions would be to adjust your temp and token generation or editing the messages as needed. Otherwise, here's hoping the devs will work on these issues.

As always, feel free to leave a review. If you like what I do and would like to request a bot, you are welcome to do so using my req form on my profile page. <3
